channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: The U.S. military announced it will begin its blockade of Ir…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The U.S. military announced it will begin its blockade of Iranian ships over the Strait of Hormuz on Tuesday, as Iran vowed to assert its own control over the critical international waterway. n.pr/4bBaVuv
item.content:encoded: The U.S. military announced it will begin its blockade of Iranian ships over the Strait of Hormuz on Tuesday, as Iran vowed to assert its own control over the critical international waterway. n.pr/4bBaVuv

item.title: AI is moving beyond chatbots and into toys, dolls, and robot…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: AI is moving beyond chatbots and into toys, dolls, and robots built to befriend children. A leading child-development expert says the technology offers real promise — but also risks crowding out the human relationships children need most. n.pr/450WOei
item.content:encoded: AI is moving beyond chatbots and into toys, dolls, and robots built to befriend children. A leading child-development expert says the technology offers real promise — but also risks crowding out the human relationships children need most. n.pr/450WOei

item.title: When Lia Eastep was 21, her father had a stroke that left hi…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: When Lia Eastep was 21, her father had a stroke that left him unsteady on his feet. His physical limitations almost caused an accident on a subway, but a stranger stepped in. n.pr/44wUNXd
item.content:encoded: When Lia Eastep was 21, her father had a stroke that left him unsteady on his feet. His physical limitations almost caused an accident on a subway, but a stranger stepped in. n.pr/44wUNXd

item.title: President Trump's deployment of the National Guard to Washin…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: President Trump's deployment of the National Guard to Washington, D.C. has been extended several times. Now, it's set to last until Inauguration Day 2029. n.pr/3SVGd9e
item.content:encoded: President Trump's deployment of the National Guard to Washington, D.C. has been extended several times. Now, it's set to last until Inauguration Day 2029. n.pr/3SVGd9e

item.title: Graham Platner generated enthusiasm in Maine with his progre…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Graham Platner generated enthusiasm in Maine with his progressive policies. Now he's out of the race, and his supporters have to decide what's next, as Maine Democrats prepare to choose a nominee. n.pr/3T26dj9
item.content:encoded: Graham Platner generated enthusiasm in Maine with his progressive policies. Now he's out of the race, and his supporters have to decide what's next, as Maine Democrats prepare to choose a nominee. n.pr/3T26dj9

item.title: More than 70 people were injured, with 24 of them still in c…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: More than 70 people were injured, with 24 of them still in critical condition, according to a statement by the Bangkok Metropolitan Administration. n.pr/4fvhEsp

item.title: The expanded World Cup allowed FIFA to introduce a new seedi…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The expanded World Cup allowed FIFA to introduce a new seeding system that placed the world's top teams in opposite corners of the knockout bracket. Now, the semifinals are both heavyweight matchups. n.pr/44Z9ZfR
item.content:encoded: The expanded World Cup allowed FIFA to introduce a new seeding system that placed the world's top teams in opposite corners of the knockout bracket. Now, the semifinals are both heavyweight matchups. n.pr/44Z9ZfR
